data.name: company.name.too_long
data.value: The company name cannot exceed 255 characters.

data.name: company.slug.invalid
data.value: The slug must contain only lowercase letters, digits and hyphens, without a leading or trailing hyphen.

data.name: company.already_exists
data.value: A company with this name or slug already exists.

data.name: company.forbidden
data.value: You are not allowed to manage members of this company.

data.name: company.member_not_found
data.value: This member was not found in the company.

data.name: company.last_owner
data.value: The last owner cannot be demoted or deactivated.

data.name: company.member_quota_exceeded
data.value: Member limit reached for the current plan.
